title: Gas Mixture Market to Reach US$ 61.27 Billion by 2030 at 5.4% CAGR,
summary: The global Gas Mixture Market is projected to reach US$ 61.27 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.4% from 2024 to 2031, driven by increasing demand for high-purity and specialty gases across healthcare, electronics, and industrial applications. Key players like Linde plc, Air Liquide S.A., Air Products and Chemicals Inc., and Taiyo Nippon Sanso Corporation are leading the market, focusing on technological advancements and strategic partnerships to meet diverse industry needs. The report highlights significant growth in North America, Europe, and Asia-Pacific, fueled by industrial expansion and technological innovation.

title: APD to Showcase Freshline IQ Freezer at Seafood Expo North America
summary: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (APD) will showcase its Freshline IQ Freezer and food freezing solutions at Seafood Expo North America in Boston. title: Freeze seafood in minutes: Air Products' cryogenic tech at Boston expo

title: Phillips 66 Names 2 Board Members after Elliott Negotiations
summary: Phillips 66 has appointed Kevin Meyers and Howard Ungerleider to its board of directors, following negotiations with activist investor Elliott Investment Management LP. Elliott had advocated for leadership changes to address the refiner's "persistent underperformance." The new board members bring extensive experience from ConocoPhillips and DowDuPont, respectively. Glenn Tilton and Marna Whittington will not seek re-election, resulting in a 14-director board with 13 independent members after the May annual meeting.
